reasoning: The button is highly locatable — light cream/beige square with golden border pops immediately against the dark teal grid background, easily spottable in under 0.5s. Contrast is strong and dark-area visibility is good. However, the pixel-art face design (two dot eyes, neutral expression) closely resembles an NPC or enemy character tile, creating confusion about whether this is a UI element or a game entity. The warm beige/tan color palette feels tonally disconnected from the cool dark-teal game world, giving a slightly 'pasted on' impression. The golden border helps anchor it but does not fully resolve the mismatch. Silhouette is clear as a square button. No severe clutter issues. Overall readable but not cleanly integrated into the Echoes aesthetic.
